titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 576

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=894 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:12:05.52597+00 | translation moa=895 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:12:05.534811+00

div.p:
M . Rex scottorum vicecomiti de berewic et omnibus suis probis hominibus et
ministris salutem . Sciatis me ecclesiam de collingaham et homines et terras et quic
quid ad eandem ecclesiam pertinet in mea protectione suscepisse . Quare
prohibeo ne aliquis eis iniuriam uel contumeliam iniuste faciat . et
... placitent aut respondeant de placitis que ad regiam meam potestatem pertinent . nisi in presentia mea . uel in presentia sup
preme iustitie mee . et ne ministri mei de beruvich homines eorum in pla
citent Testibus . Walter . filio Alani . senescallo . Ricardo de Morwilla . Conestabulario
dauid olifard . Apud Collingaham .

p.cl: Malcolm, king of the Scots, to the sheriff of Berwick and all worthy men and officials, greeting.

Know me to have received the church of Coldingham and the men and lands and whatever belongs to the same church under my protection. Wherefore I forbid that anyone unlawfully do injustice or harm to them; and they may [not] plead or answer pleas which pertain to my royal authority, unless they are in my presence, or in the presence of my supreme justice, and my officials of Beriwck are not to implead their men.
As witnesses: Walter son of Alan, steward; Richard de Morville, constable; David Oliphant.
